---
title: "Project 2"
author: "Evan Whitfield"
format: html
---
```{r}
library(tidyr)
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(gt)
library(ggplot2)
```


# Data Exploration


```{r}
nfl_data <- read_csv("data/NFL_play_data.csv") |>
  rename(yards_gained = Yards.Gained)
```
```{r}
dim(nfl_data)
str(nfl_data, max_level=1)
```

```{r}
pan_play_data <- nfl_data |>
  filter(posteam == "CAR")

dim(pan_play_data)

unique(nfl_data$posteam)
```


```{r}
pan_rp_play_data <- pan_play_data |>
  filter(PlayType %in% c("Run", "Pass"))

dim(pan_rp_play_data)

table(pan_rp_play_data$PlayType)
```


```{r}
nfc_south_data <- nfl_data |>
  filter(PlayType %in% c("Run", "Pass"),
         posteam %in% c("CAR", "NO", "TB", "ATL")) |>
  select(posteam, PlayType, yards_gained)
```


```{r}
head(nfc_south_data)
```
